events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Sir Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed the game forever. Where were you when 'Video Killed The Radio Star' first hit your screen?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994, which quickly became a Britpop defining record.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. That album still sounds as fresh and anthemic today as it did in '94. What's your top track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on! Which artist would you have loved to see there?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only Elvis Presley today, 49 years on. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's shooting
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas, leading to his death days later; he would have been 55.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, the music world lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his profound impact on hip-hop and culture. Which of his tracks resonates most with you?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away; he would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost one of the greatest guitarists of all time, Jimi Hendrix. His influence is still felt across music today. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in 1969, featuring classic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Something'.

angles.name: Timeless Masterpiece
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs... pure genius. What's your go-to track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still delivering those powerful vocals and sharp lyrics. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a British rock legend, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite track he's fronted?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released on the 'Shaved Fish' compilation album in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released. Its message of peace and unity resonates just as strongly today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod in 2001, revolutionising how people listened to music on the go.

angles.name: Digital Music Revolution
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the original iPod dropped and changed everything. Suddenly, '1,000 songs in your pocket' was a reality. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme tunes, 007 has been thrilling us for decades. Who's your favourite Bond and what's the best theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering A Legend
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the unparalleled talent and vision of John Lennon. His music continues to inspire peace and love.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the wonderfully absurd John Cleese! From silly walks to hotel mayhem, he's given us some of Britain's finest comedy moments. What's your favourite Cleese character?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', in 1968.

angles.name: Iconic Double LP
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles delivered the sprawling masterpiece that is 'The White Album'. So much incredible music across those four sides. Which track is your absolute favourite?
